phase_1.audio: Sound level monitoring shows fluctuation from 87.8 dBA to sustained 76.8 dBA. Higher ambient noise detected; concentration requires active focus effort.

phase_2.correlations: Correlation analysis reveals moderate compatibility between positional, kinetic, and acoustic factors.
phase_2.holistic_assessment: Challenging environmental factors identified: 76.8 dB acoustic baseline, postural adjustments, potential physiological stress.

phase_3.recommendations: Use active noise cancellation or white noise to counteract loud surroundings.
